pi_items.source: Confirmed via export_result.sh checks and the task description instructions.

Discovered that the task is defective. setup_task.sh attempts to download dicom_viewer_0006.zip from rubomedical.com, but the URL returns a 404 Not Found error. Due to '|| true' shell fallbacks, the setup silently succeeds without providing any actual DICOM data to the agent.
Confirmed via verifier.py logic where minimum size of 20000 bytes is strictly enforced for scoring.

privileged_info_summary: The task instructions establish a scenario requiring the fusion of a PET scan with a CT scan. The required target output path (/home/ga/DICOM/exports/fusion_view.jpg) and minimum export file size constraint (20000 bytes) explicitly match the task description and verifier.py logic. However, an independent audit reveals a critical defect in the task: the target underlying clinical DICOM dataset (dicom_viewer_0006.zip from rubomedical.com) does not exist and returns a 404 Not Found error. Due to permissive error handling ('|| true') in setup_task.sh, the environment sets up silently without providing any actual DICOM files to the target data directory (/home/ga/DICOM/pet_ct), rendering the stated task impossible to complete normally.
